{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323163236A677E5B3CABFDAB835E6"}"},"total":10},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7600975492744790846","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"回味期待回味期待，想看下去"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769742949,"group_id":"7586571265935166488","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/3hTSswyKKOB+31g0FKalU=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"102201937185","user_name":"海心鮫珠的傅先生"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"102201937185","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7586571265935166488","book_info":{"abstract":"【古言+基建+自攻略+女强】
996基建狗林巧，过劳猝死，魂穿古代。开局就是家破人亡，全家流放。
囚车、雪地、饿到脱相的病弱亲人……这死亡剧本让土木工程师的DNA彻底暴走！
面对不毛之地，别人求生，她搞开发。
“这地质，适合挖地窖，保鲜！”
“这风向，适合盘火炕，过冬！”
“这岩层，下面必有水源和煤矿！”
她带领一群老弱病残的流放犯，将苦寒绝境当成全新项目，凭亿身基建技能，硬生生把流放地改造成了塞上江南。
只是，那个奉命监视她的冰山王爷萧玄，看她的眼神越来越不对劲。
林巧（捏捏他的腹肌）：“王爷这核心力量不错，估摸着能扛两袋水泥。”
萧玄（耳根爆红，内心狂喜）：“她爱我！她果然爱上我了！”
林巧（掂量着他送的玉佩）：“质地坚硬，密度高，砸开做个刮刀应该很耐用。”
萧玄（心痛又甜蜜）：“她连定情信物都想随身使用，她爱我爱得好深！”
当京城的皇帝终于想起这片被遗忘的土地时，斥候带回的报告让他目瞪口呆：昔日的极寒流放地，如今已是牛羊满山坡，鱼米赛江南的“新希望城”！而那个罪臣之女，已然是这座城唯一的女王。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/059534b3ef5cd5c4be52ea3866722b3e","author":"菡菡酱","author_id":"","book_id":"7586571265935166488","book_name":"流放后，我靠基建燃翻塞北","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#402010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2725人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":468,"name":"冰山","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=468&name=冰山&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7586571814101320217","read_count":"2725","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"207078"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"78","tags":"种田,古代言情,女强,冰山,基建,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/bde1ff41f1b60e1b1d0a746ef6de81f4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779438757&x-signature=FR70dcclDIiy8QJ25qfq7NUiZ50%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"940830968524910","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"52"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323163236A677E5B3CABFDAB835E6"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},
